overall.description: Cinematic game engine footage of an aerial drone flight over a desolate alien coastline. The scene features hazy yellow-orange skies, barren rocky terrain, distant ships on the water, and dramatic atmospheric lighting with sun glare.

scene_state.functional_zone: rocky coastal overlook with distant maritime vessels

events.description: small red aerial object flies quickly from left to right across the frame
distant ships begin to disappear behind the rising coastal terrain

agents.ego_description: flying forward over rocky terrain toward the coastline, panning right to follow the landscape

entered.detail: two large vessels or structures visible on the horizon over the water
calm body of water stretching to the horizon with muted teal color
barren reddish-brown rocky ground with scattered boulders and uneven surface
dark rocky cliff formation emerging along the right side of the frame

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a desolate alien coastline with a hazy yellow sky. Two distant ships are visible on the water's horizon while the camera flies forward over rough rocky terrain. A small red object briefly flies across the left side of the frame, and coastal cliffs begin to rise on the right as the ships start to disappear from view.

scene_state.functional_zone: sunlit rocky coastline with steep cliff faces

events.description: sun becomes visible through the haze creating a bright lens flare and warm backlighting

agents.ego_description: flying along the coastline with ocean to the left and rising cliffs to the right, maintaining steady altitude

entered.detail: bright white-yellow sun visible through atmospheric haze creating lens flare effects
massive dark rock formations and boulders scattered along the coastal ridge

segments.scene_description: The ships have disappeared from view as the camera continues along the coastline. The sun breaks through the haze creating dramatic backlighting and lens flares on the water. Large rock outcrops dominate the right side while the ocean recedes to the left background, and the terrain remains consistently barren and rocky.

scene_state.functional_zone: barren rocky highlands with distant mountain peaks

agents.ego_description: flying over inland rocky terrain with large boulders and rolling hill formations, moving away from the coast

entered.detail: distant mountain silhouettes visible through the hazy atmosphere

segments.scene_description: The camera moves inland over the barren rocky highlands, leaving the ocean behind. Large rock formations and boulders dominate the foreground while distant mountain peaks emerge through the haze. The warm yellow lighting continues with the sun high in the sky, and the terrain shows no signs of vegetation or life.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous aerial flight that begins over a desolate alien coastline and gradually moves inland toward barren rocky highlands. It begins by gliding over rough terrain under a hazy yellow sky, passing a small red object as two distant ships on the horizon fade from view behind rising coastal cliffs. As the camera continues along the shore, the sun breaks through the haze to create dramatic backlighting and lens flares across the water, while large rock outcrops begin to dominate the right side of the frame. The scene then shifts away from the receding ocean, moving deeper into the interior where the terrain transforms into a landscape of massive boulders and rock formations. Finally, the camera pushes forward through the warm yellow light toward distant mountain peaks emerging from the haze, leaving all signs of the coast behind.
